extension.description: Visual explorer for Antigravity AI coding assistant — browse skills, brain conversations, knowledge items, and sync memory across machines.
viewsContainer.title: Antigravity Explorer
config.geminiApiKey: Gemini API Key for Brain distillation. Get yours from [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey).
config.autoDistill: Suggest distillation when reaching milestone conversations (default: on)
config.autoDistillThreshold: Number of completed conversations to trigger distillation suggestion (default: 5)
